overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy adventure game showing a character exploring a snowy mountain valley at night. The character walks through pine forests and open snow fields, encountering a large moose before continuing toward a distant castle structure visible on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain valley with scattered pine trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the snowy valley, navigating between pine trees and rocky outcrops on grassy terrain

entered.detail: tall pine tree with snow-covered branches on the left side of the path
snow-covered pine tree further back on the left slope
snowy hillside rising on the right side of the valley
dark rocky cliff face visible in the distance on the left
mountain silhouettes visible on the horizon under the starry sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a wide snowy mountain valley at night, with snow-covered pine trees lining the left side and a snowy slope rising on the right. The ground is a mix of grass and patches of snow, with distant mountains visible under a starry teal sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snow field with wildlife encounter

events.description: large moose with antlers emerges from the right and walks parallel to the character

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk forward alongside a large moose that is moving in the same direction through the snow

notable_agents.action: large moose with prominent antlers walking parallel to the character in the same direction

entered.detail: large castle or fortress structure visible on the distant mountain horizon
expansive open area covered in deep snow replacing the grassy valley floor

segments.scene_description: The terrain opens into a wide snow field where a large moose emerges and walks alongside the character. As they progress, a distant castle structure becomes visible on the horizon, and the pine trees recede into the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain ridge with distant castle view

events.description: moose exits the frame to the right, leaving the character alone on the ridge

agents.ego_description: walking up a snowy ridge toward the distant castle structure now clearly visible ahead

entered.detail: snow-covered ridge line forming the path forward with visible footprints

segments.scene_description: The moose departs as the character ascends a snowy ridge, with the distant castle now prominently visible in the center of the view. The surrounding trees have fallen behind, leaving an open snow-covered path toward the horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a nocturnal mountain valley that gradually opens into a vast, snowy expanse leading toward a distant fortress. It begins with the character walking between a line of snow-covered pine trees and a rising slope under a starry teal sky. As the terrain expands into a wide snow field, a large moose emerges to walk alongside the character while the forest recedes and a castle structure appears on the horizon. The scene then shifts as the moose departs and the character ascends a snowy ridge, leaving the trees behind entirely. Finally, the view opens completely onto a desolate, snow-covered path with the distant castle now prominently centered against the night sky.
